channel.title: Download on Margrop Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Download on Margrop Blog

item.title: Synology Chat download and installation address
item.description:
Due to well-known reasons, Chat has now disappeared

However, the international version of the Synology site can still be downloaded and used normally.

Use and cherish

  • DS3617xsInternational Version Download Center

  • Chat Kit download address

  • Chat Android version download address

*Chat Apple users must find an overseas iCloud account to install it.

  • The above Chat package and APK have been backed up to the download center of this site
